subcodes.first_line: O Iskandar! We have, verily, directed Our gaze towards thee from the precincts of the Prison, and have revealed unto thee that which shall draw thee unto the Most Sublime Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسکندر قد اقبلنا الیک من شطر السجن و انزلنا لک ما یجذبک الی الافق الاعلی المقام
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
